name: Budget Planning
description: Owns monthly category budgets and budget-period rules; consumes LEDGER actuals. Awaiting its own brainstorm.
problem_statement: Monthly spending intent cannot be evaluated consistently because budget amounts are not connected to the same spend-category dimension and canonical transactions used for actuals.
why_now: A trusted ledger needs a matching monthly budget model before spend can be assessed as on-track or off-track.

rationale: Monthly category budgets require the ledger's shared spend categories and transaction actuals.
